allow: PowerShell($css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lacteoslasmarias.com/wp-content/litespeed/css/0c88288d2a7072269c26a9642e1cc578.css?ver=069ca" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"\).Content; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($css, '#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}'\); $counts = $matches | Group-Object Value | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 25; $counts | Format-Table Count, Name)
